playbooks.title: Search repository, filters, apply, assert results
steps: Enter query and optional path or file-type filters
Apply filters and wait for stable result grid
Assert filtered results match expectation (scoped to grid/panel)
locator_guidance: Scope Spectrum menus: //span[@class='spectrum-Menu-itemLabel'][normalize-space()='…'] inside visible dialog/menu
Scroll inside scrollable dialog panels before interacting with off-viewport items
scroll_guidance: Use scroll-container-aware actions; avoid global page-only scroll when target is in dialog/menu
assertion_guidance: Assert on stable labels or grid rows; avoid bare indexed XPath
Tie Then steps to Jira acceptance/Criteria quotes
anti_patterns: raw XPath or CSS inside Behave step lines

playbooks.title: Locate in Repository / Map
locator_guidance: Normalize-space label matching for Spectrum menu items
Dialog/menu submenus must be scoped to the active overlay
